text.title: Feature Flag Types and Lifecycle Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the flag a temporary rollout, an experiment, an operational switch, or an entitlement?

text.example: Flag new-checkout-flow → interview classifies kind=release → retire_by=2026-06-01 (created 2026-05-01 + 30d) → owner=checkout-team → committed.
